reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All 3 gates passed. An attacker can trigger this via P2P gossip by first sending a valid DataColumnSidecar to populate the cache (using blockRootHex + index as key), then resubmitting the same header with a forged signature. The cache hit at L301 causes early return at L307 before validateGossipDataColumnSidecar executes at L317, bypassing signature verification (dataColumnSidecar.ts:127-137) and allowing the node to accept and rebroadcast the invalid-signature sidecar to peers. This is a single-packet attack against an untrusted P2P entry point that violates the specification invariant requiring signature verification for all items.
